memoryArtifacts.headline: Life of Sir Richard Waldegrave
memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir Richard Waldegrave (; c. 1338 – 2 May 1410) was a Member of Parliament for Suffolk and Speaker of the House of Commons during the reign of King Richard II.

Life
His father Sir Richard Waldegrave …

zh.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Waldegrave於1358年出生在英國素福爾可時，他的父親Richard Waldegrave23歲，母親Jayne Silvester19歲。他於1392年與Jane De Vauncy在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1434年5月2日在英國素福爾可布勒斯享年76歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可布勒斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Waldegrave于1358年出生在英国素福爾可时，他的父亲Richard Waldegrave23岁，母亲Jayne Silvester19岁。他于1392年与Jane De Vauncy在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1434年5月2日在英国素福爾可布勒斯享年76岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可布勒斯。

nameMeanings.name: Waldegrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Walgrave (Northants), which is recorded as Waldgrave in 1086.

variants.name: Woolgrove
meanings: English: unexplained, possibly a late variant of   Waldegrave  .

variants.name: Allgrove
meanings: English: unexplained, possibly a variant of   Waldegrave  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Waldegrave was born in 1358, in Suffolk, England, his father, Richard Waldegrave, was 23 and his mother, Jayne Silvester, was 19. He married Jane De Vauncy in 1392, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 2 May 1434, in Bures, Suffolk, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Bures, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Waldegrave est né en 1358, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Richard Waldegrave, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Jayne Silvester, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Jane De Vauncy en 1392, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 mai 1434, à Bures, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Bures, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Waldegrave 1358 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Waldegrave 23 und seine Mutter Jayne Silvester 19. Er hat 1392 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England Jane De Vauncy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. Mai 1434 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Bures, Suffolk, England und wurde in Bures, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Waldegrave è nato il nel 1358 nel Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Richard Waldegrave, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Jayne Silvester, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Jane De Vauncy nel 1392, nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 maggio 1434, nel Bures, Suffolk, England, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Bures, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Waldegraveが1358年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Richard Waldegraveは23歳，母Jayne Silvesterは19歳であった。1392年にイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズでJane De Vauncyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1434年5月2日にイギリススフォルクブレスで76歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクブレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Waldegrave(이)가 1358년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Waldegrave(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Jayne Silvester(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1392년 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 Jane De Vauncy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1434년 5월 2일 영국 수폴크 버스에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 버스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Waldegrave nasceu em 1358, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Waldegrave, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Jayne Silvester, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane De Vauncy em 1392, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de maio de 1434, em Bures, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Bures, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Waldegrave родился в 1358 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Waldegrave было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Jayne Silvester, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane De Vauncy в 1392 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 2 мая 1434 г. в местности буресь, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности буресь, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Waldegrave nació en 1358, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Waldegrave, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Jayne Silvester, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Jane De Vauncy en 1392, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1434, en Bures, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Bures, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
